review:
ISSUES:
- [severity:info] src/dashboard/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx:190 - The defensive check for `'-'` is localized to this file. Other components like `SessionCard.tsx` that use `{session.project_name || session.project_path}` may still display the hyphen for legacy sessions where both fields are set to `'-'` until those sessions are re-processed by the backend.

VERDICT: approve
SUMMARY: Changes successfully clean up non-project session identifiers by returning empty strings from the backend and adding defensive filtering in the dashboard UI.
